business_ideas.idea: AI body double trained on personal content (blog, tweets, videos) that answers questions better than the person
Plaid for AI tools - port context/memory across AI apps without full data handoff
AI video generation for promotional content (Higsfield or similar to create speaker promos)

predictions.text: Best employees will eventually work for millions of companies via productized AI agents instead of traditional hiring
Will spend 24 hours per day in ChatGPT soon, making traditional app interfaces obsolete
